info.title: Unity Asset Bundle Builder for RimWorld Mods
info.description: A standalone command-line tool for building Unity asset bundles for RimWorld mods. Automatically creates temporary Unity projects and builds asset bundles with proper compression and platform support.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Unity Asset Bundle Builder for RimWorld mods

arguments.name: bundle-config
arguments.description: Bundle configuration names from TOML file (can specify multiple) [default: System.String[]]
